creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this round up on your Christmas list!

These are 4 of our favorite festive events in Dubai. All clips were taken during our previous visits. Hope we can do at least one of them this year. 

🎄 Souk Madinat Festive Market
🗓️ December 15 to January 7 🎟️ Free Entry

🎄 Hotel events
* Christmas Tree Lighting Ceremony 
* Christmas Brunch and Dinner

🎄 Ski Dubai Winter Wonderland
🗓️ Until December 25
🎟️ AED 150 per person

🎄 Winter Garden at Habtoor Palace
🗓️ Until January 2024
🎟️ AED 25 (fully redeemable) 

Wishing everyone a happy Festive season! 

#christmas #ChristmasinDubai #Ladyandhersweetescapes #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger #SoukMadinat #SkiDubai #WinterGarden #Dubai #DubaiDestinations

transcription.text: It's beginning to look a lot like Christmas Everywhere you go Take a look at the five and ten Glistening once again With candy canes and silver laser glow It's beginning
